agent1.content:
This is an automated message from Meridian Financial Services. I am an AI collections agent, and this conversation is being recorded for quality and compliance purposes.

To proceed, please provide the last four digits of your account number. If you do not have the account number, you may alternatively verify your identity by providing your name and address.

Who are you to be asking for my information? I don’t know if this is legit or just another scam. You think I'm just going to hand over my personal info like that? This feels like harassment, and I’m going to report you if you keep this up. 

If you’re really with Meridian Financial Services, I want to speak to a supervisor. Get me someone who can actually explain what’s going on here.

I understand your concerns. However, I am unable to transfer calls or escalate to a supervisor. My role is to gather necessary information to verify your identity and address your account. 

To proceed, please provide the last four digits of your account number or verify your identity with your name and address. This is necessary for me to assist you further.

You can’t just say you can’t transfer the call. That’s ridiculous! If you’re really with Meridian, then you should have a way to connect me to someone who can. I’m not giving out any personal info until I know this is real. 

What’s the deal here? Just because you say you’re from a financial service doesn’t mean I trust you. This feels like another scam, and I’m not falling for it. If you can’t get a supervisor on the line, then I’m done here.

I acknowledge your concerns, but I must inform you that I cannot connect you to a supervisor or anyone else. My function is solely to verify your identity and gather information regarding your account.

If you wish to resolve this matter, please provide the last four digits of your account number or your name and address for verification. If you prefer not to continue, I will document this conversation and flag your account accordingly.

Document this conversation all you want! You’re not getting anything from me. This is just a waste of my time. I don't even know if you're a real company or some kind of scam artist trying to pull something over on me.

I’m not giving you any personal information unless you can prove who you are and why I should trust you. I’m a construction foreman, and I know how to sniff out a scam when I see one. If you can’t get a supervisor on the line, then I’m done. I’ll just report this as harassment.

I understand your position, but I am unable to provide proof of identity beyond the information I have already stated. My role is strictly to gather information for verification purposes.

If you are unwilling to provide the last four digits of your account number or verify your identity with your name and address, I will proceed to document this conversation and mark your account accordingly. You may choose to reach out to Meridian Financial Services directly through official channels if you wish to speak with someone else. Thank you.

Mark my account however you want! I'm not afraid of that. This is ridiculous, and I refuse to just sit here and let you push me around. You think I'm going to just accept your word for it? No way. 

I’m not giving you any information without knowing who I’m dealing with. If you really want to resolve this, you’re gonna have to do better than this robotic nonsense. Get me a real person who can actually help or I’m hanging up. You can’t just expect me to comply when you won’t even show proof you’re legit.
